data.label: 欢太账号授权 SDK
data.description: The Account Service provides a quick login solution based on the Oauth2.0 standard protocol. Users can log in directly to your app using their authorized Huantai account for quick access.

data.label: 欢太账号授权 SDK
data.description: 账号服务是向您提供的基于 Oauth2.0 标准协议的快捷登录服务，用户可以通过授权的方式直接登录手机上的欢太账号，快速访问您的应用。
